pages.text: Weavers Paradise introduces several new plants, each with its own purpose. Some provide textile fibers, others produce dyes, and a few contain unique resources that cannot be obtained elsewhere.

pages.title: Wild Cotton
pages.text: Wild Cotton naturally grows across the world. Breaking it yields Cotton Seeds, allowing you to cultivate your own cotton farm.$(br2)$(t:Breaking this block without Leather Gloves deals 1 point of damage)$(#FF0000)Note to self$(/t)

pages.title: Cotton Plant
pages.text: Cotton Seeds can be planted on farmland to grow Cotton Plants. Mature plants produce Cotton Bolls, which can be processed into Raw Cotton for spinning into thread.$(br2)$(t:Breaking this block without Leather Gloves deals 1 point of damage)$(#FF0000)Note to self$(/t)

pages.title: Chromatic Bloom
pages.text: Rare flower that grows in deepslate layer with chance of 1/16 per chunk.$(br)This item can be processed 2 times for 2 different Dye Types:$(li)Chromatic Bloom Fruit (rainbow)$(li)Chromatic Dust (polychromatic)
